item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia and Ukraine agree to three-day ceasefire with prisoner swap
item.description: Russia and Ukraine confirmed a US-brokered three-day ceasefire from May 9-11, with a planned 1,000-for-1,000 prisoner swap. Trump expressed hope for an extension.

item.title: 🛡️ Ukraine running short of air defence missiles after Russian winter campaign
item.description: Ukraine's air force warned it is running short of air defence missiles after Russia's massive winter attack campaign, as it braces for further strikes.

item.title: 🇹🇼 US concerned Taiwan defense delays are "concession" to China
item.description: The US State Department warned that further delays to Taiwan's military spending represent a 'concession' to China, as Taipei's defense ministry detailed the impact of projects excluded from a budget package.

item.title: 🇵🇾 Paraguay president affirms strong Taiwan ties during Taipei visit
item.description: Paraguay President Santiago Pena said his country "deeply values" relations with Taiwan and will continue to offer support, during a formal welcome in Taipei.

item.title: 🇬🇧 British MPs to visit China for first time in seven years
item.description: A cross-party delegation of British lawmakers will visit China this month in a sign of warming ties after Beijing agreed to lift sanctions on six MPs following Prime Minister Keir Starmer's January visit.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France arrests Ukrainian linked to notorious Russian torture prison in occupied Donetsk
item.description: French authorities detained a suspect accused of assisting the head of the Izolyatsia prison camp in torturing inmates, marking the second time a foreign country has detained a suspect charged with war crimes in Ukraine.

item.title: 🔥 Massive forest fire sparked by Russian strikes in Ukraine doubles in size to 4,300 hectares
item.description: The forest fire near Ukraine's border with Russia has expanded from 2,400 to 4,300 hectares (10,600 acres), with FPV drones reportedly blocking firefighter access to the area.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU prepares to back Belgium in frozen assets fight against Russian oligarchs
item.description: Russian oligarchs are using a 1989 Soviet-era investment treaty to challenge frozen asset seizures, prompting Belgium to seek EU support in the legal battle over sanctions enforcement.

item.title: 🌏 ASEAN leaders agree to create shared fuel reserve for future crises
item.description: ASEAN leaders agreed to establish a shared fuel reserve to help the bloc weather future energy supply disruptions amid global uncertainty.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US imposes sanctions on 10 individuals and companies aiding Iran's weapons sector
item.description: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions on a network of 10 individuals and entities providing material support to Iran's weapons development programs.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE countering Iranian air attack after Trump says ceasefire still in effect
item.description: The UAE announced it was countering an Iranian air attack amid ongoing regional tensions, while President Trump stated a ceasefire between the US and Iran remains in effect.

item.title: 🇺🇳 US revises UN resolution on Iran, China and Russia still expected to veto
item.description: Washington removed explicit Chapter VII powers from its UN draft on Iran, but tough language remains and vetoes by China and Russia are still expected as the ceasefire holds.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan parliament approves extra defense spending, less than government wanted
item.description: Taiwan's opposition-controlled parliament approved extra defense spending of $25 billion, about two-thirds of the amount sought by the government to bolster forces against China's military modernization.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Pro-independence parties surge across Britain as divisions deepen
item.description: Pro-independence parties are gaining ground across Britain as political divisions over Brexit, the economy and governance deepen fractures within the United Kingdom.

item.title: ⚔️ NATO chief warns China arming Russia is 'serious security threat'
item.description: NATO Secretary-General warned that China's provision of weapons to Russia poses a serious security threat to the alliance and must be addressed urgently.

item.title: 🛢️ US forces strike two empty Iranian oil tankers, Central Command says
item.description: US Central Command confirmed strikes on two empty Iranian oil tankers, part of ongoing operations targeting Iranian energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Foreign militias brought in to enforce Iran crackdown
item.description: Iran has reportedly brought in foreign militias to help enforce domestic crackdowns amid growing internal dissent and economic pressures.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Iran says US naval escalation raises doubts about Washington's commitment to diplomacy
item.description: Iran's foreign ministry stated that increased US naval presence in the Persian Gulf undermines diplomatic efforts and raises questions about America's commitment to negotiations.

item.title: 🇭🇹 Four convicted in US trial tied to 2021 assassination of Haiti's president
item.description: A US federal court convicted four people on conspiracy charges related to the 2021 assassination of Haitian President Jovenel Moïse.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine war: Russia must end aggression for just peace, UK tells UN
item.description: At the UN Security Council, the UK ambassador emphasized that Russia must end its aggression against Ukraine to achieve a just and lasting peace.

item.title: 🌍 Eritrea and Ethiopia leaders meet in Eritrea after peace deal
item.description: Eritrean President Isaias Afwerki hosted Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed in Asmara, continuing diplomatic engagement following their historic peace agreement.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Why Iran's ambassador to China thinks US can't turn Beijing against it
item.description: Iran's ambassador to China argues that deep economic and strategic ties between Tehran and Beijing make it unlikely Washington can pressure China to abandon its partnership with Iran.

item.title: 🚢 Two LNG tankers cross Hormuz on way to Japan and China, but shortage persists
item.description: Two LNG tankers transited the Strait of Hormuz heading to Japan and China, but energy supply concerns persist amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine receives first domestically-produced Bohdana howitzers
item.description: Ukraine has received its first batch of domestically-produced Bohdana howitzers, marking a significant milestone in the country's defense industry development.

item.title: ⚔️ Ukraine's security chief says Russia planning new offensive this summer
item.description: Ukraine's Security Service chief warned that Russia is planning a new summer offensive, urging continued Western military support.
